summary: Built + ran the sequential coreference reading pipeline over the ENTIRE Dawn-Breakers (doc 21308). DeepSeek (deepseek-chat = v4-flash non-thinking) read all 1900 text paragraphs in windows carrying a running cast, capturing 20,504 person-references (name/title/epithet/role/kinship/pronoun — never just names). 14 Claude region-reconcilers bound labels to DB entities by ATTRIBUTE TRIANGULATION (never keyword). Applied 943 new entity_mention links (REVERSIBLE) + queued 127 new persons + 124 ambiguous + 7 duplicate-merge candidates for review. Both acceptance arcs validated.

seqread_pipeline.read: 1900/1900 paragraphs, 0 gaps. scripts/entity-read/{seq-read,find-gaps,fill-gaps,aggregate}.mjs. Window overflow handled by salvage + smaller windows (20->8->4->2 for dense roster paras); fetch timeout added.
seqread_pipeline.reconcile: 14 region-reconcilers (Claude triangulation) -> region-NN-map.json. ~1670 certain binds, ~278 new, ~124 ambiguous. Cross-window identity unified THROUGH shared DB entity ids.
seqread_pipeline.apply: scripts/entity-read/apply-seqread.mjs. 943 rows extractor_version='seqread-v1'. 407 query-miss majors recovered by normalized name. New persons NOT auto-created.
seqread_pipeline.validate: Mutavalli + Abdul-Khaliq/Dhabih (paras 63-1674, Badasht+after) PASS; dreamer son-of-Abdul-Majid found-but-fragmented (merge queued)

review_needed: 127 new persons (Yar-Muhammad x89, Wife of the Bab, etc. — review before creating); 7 duplicate-merge candidates (the dreamer; 1249465->1249227 Mutavalli stub; 1249485->1249427; 1249734->1247601; Imam Hasan; the fourth Gate; Haji Muhammad-Karim Khan); DB-summary fix (Nayriz officers 1250104-6 mislabeled Tabarsi)
operational_attention: STILL OPEN from 2026-06-18 overnight run: 1) pool 'fast' is SINGLE NVMe, NO redundancy — re-attach a 2nd NVMe + retire failing A400. 2) siftersearch-updater FROZEN (pm2 stop) — restart + re-park graph workers when ready. 3) writer path is fast; entity_mentions writes go direct to graph.db (busy_timeout), seqread merges route content writes via SIFTER_WRITER_URL.
prior_step3_remaining: From overnight run (separate from seqread): reading-agent GPB-description pass for person+work entities; re-resolve 5 held bare-name buckets by context; deliberately create 644 footnote/narrative candidates (content-new-candidates.json).
